main.description: Public-person disclosure package for a covenantal SS recipient (ADR-2607177000). Facts only — no personal score/rank/percentile. Member-signed (no-server-key). Freshness is stage-dependent; stale → hold entitlements while public-person? remains true.

wellbecomingAttestFact.description: Attestation fact — NOT a wellbecoming points score.

maintainerDid.description: SBT-bound DID of the recipient (public identity).

wageLaborBand.description: Wage/subsistence labor band fact (e.g. 0-10h). Not a score.

asOf.description: ISO-8601 or quarter tag for this disclosure package (freshness).

stateBenefits.description: Whether the recipient also receives state benefits (dual-recognition honesty, N4). false is a valid fact.

memberSignature.description: Optional signature CID / attest token (R1 offline may be :representative).

relatedPartyEdges.description: Declared 縁 to producing actors / vote subjects (private capture guard).

multiGenCareFacts.description: Optional public multi-gen care facts (子/孫 rails). Not scores.
